log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Fairy — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/3 targets affected.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Fairy — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub (distance 30ft, range 5ft).
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Fairy — Unarmored Caster with Rock: [d20:3+9=12 vs AC 15] MISS.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Fairy — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:1+3=4 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 133/138
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Fairy — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub (distance 30ft, range 5ft).
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Fairy — Unarmored Caster with Rock: [d20:19+9=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 35 damage. Fairy — Unarmored Caster HP: 32/67
→ Fairy — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 9 vs DC 17]
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Fairy — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub (distance 30ft, range 5ft).
=== ROUND 3 ===

--- Frost Giant's turn ---

Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Fairy — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Fairy — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Fairy — Unarmored Caster.
→ Fairy — Unarmored Caster healed for 6 HP. HP: 13/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Fairy — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub (distance 30ft, range 5ft).
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Fairy — Unarmored Caster with Rock: [d20:16+9=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 28 damage. Fairy — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
→ Fairy — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 9 vs DC 14]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
